# AppMigrationTester.AppImportController

**Class**

A class you use to test your extension’s import code.

## Declaration

```swift
final class AppImportController
```

## Overview

Use the [doc://AppMigrationKit/documentation/AppMigrationKit/AppMigrationTester/importController] property to obtain an instance of this class, then use its methods to call the import-related code of your app migration extension.

## Testing resource import

- **importResources(from:importRequest:progress:)**: Tells the migration extension to begin importing transportable resources into the app extension.

## Completing an import

- **registerImportCompletion(with:)**: Tells your app that import completed with a given status.

## Testing import

- **importController**: An instance of the controller object you use to test your import code.

## Conforms To

- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
